title: Finite-size scaling looks stable
body:
候选结论：在当前 toy model 上，谱隙随系统尺寸增大呈现稳定收敛趋势。

Inline check: the fitted exponent is $\alpha \approx 1.97$.

$$\Delta_N \approx \Delta_\infty + c N^{-\alpha}$$

title: Symmetry-constrained ansatz before brute-force sweeps
body:
这次更有效的做法不是盲扫参数，而是先把对称性约束写清楚，再缩小搜索空间。

Practical note: keep a short rejection log for ansatz choices that fail quickly.

details.worked_because: Search space dropped by roughly one order of magnitude.
details.watch_out: Can over-constrain the trial family if assumptions are too strong.

title: Automated follow-up search surfaced a mismatch
body:
自动动作触发后，系统对 benchmark 文献和当前推导做了对照。

Result: one reference used a different normalization convention, so the first comparison failed.

title: Loop 4 summary and confidence update
body:
本轮闭环的关键进展是：候选命题没有被推翻，但可信度提升主要来自排除了两个常见伪象。

Confidence moved from cautious to moderately positive, but not yet publication-ready.

surprises: Finite-size drift was smaller than expected.
details.human_attention_needed: Check whether the benchmark choice is too easy.

title: Notebook-style closure snapshot
body:
闭环结果：当前路线值得继续，但应把“规范约定统一”提升为显式 gate。

Summary metric: $F_1 = 0.91$, with no contradiction detected in the present validation slice.

$$\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{score}} = \lambda_1 E_{\mathrm{fit}} + \lambda_2 E_{\mathrm{consistency}}$$
